description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the rustlang/rust:nightly Docker image and defines a single deploy stage job named pages. The pages job runs only on the master branch and executes the exact shell commands in order: rustup install stable, rustup component add rustfmt, cargo +stable check, cargo +nightly check, cargo fmt -- --check, cd fuzz, cargo check, cd ../benchmark, cargo check, cd .., ./test.sh, cargo doc --no-deps, and cp -r target/doc public. It publishes the generated documentation by storing the public directory as an artifact and deploys it to GitLab Pages. No caches or services are configured.
